summary: Promoted the merged interactive ops portal journey bundle into canonical mainline truth as repository version `0.177.144` and platform version `0.130.91` from the latest realistic `origin/main` baseline `0.177.143 / 0.130.90`, carrying ADR 0308 journey-aware entry routing, ADR 0310 first-run activation checklist and progressive capability reveal, ADR 0312 shared notification center and activity timeline, and a resilient retry around the shared search-fabric runtime sync through the same governed production replay.

verification.observed: `scripts/release_manager.py status --json` confirmed the latest-main baseline, `--dry-run --bump patch` resolved repository version `0.177.144`, and the final release write updated the protected repo surfaces without invoking the external Outline sync because `LV3_SKIP_OUTLINE_SYNC=1` was set for this exact-main closeout.

verification.check: Focused interactive ops portal regression slice
verification.observed: `make syntax-check-ops-portal` and the focused pytest slice passed from the exact integration worktree, leaving the portal runtime, playbook, and runtime-role regression slice at `47 passed`.

The first combined replay exposed a real runtime drift where the shared search-fabric copy could race a missing destination directory; after adding a bounded retry in `ops_portal_runtime`, the final replay completed successfully with recap `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=194 changed=16 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=40 rescued=0 ignored=0`.

verification.check: Guest-local journey, activation, and attention contract
verification.observed: Guest-local verification confirmed `/health`, the neutral `Journey-Aware Start Surface`, the `First-Run Activation` partial, the shared `Notification Center` partial, and the shared launcher/search partial from inside `docker-runtime-lv3`.
The public `https://ops.lv3.org/entry` edge returned `HTTP/2 302` with `location: https://ops.lv3.org/oauth2/sign_in?rd=https://ops.lv3.org/entry`, preserving the unauthenticated oauth2-proxy gate.

verification.check: Generated truth refresh after the platform-version bump
verification.observed: After manually promoting platform version `0.130.91`, the exact-main tree regenerated platform vars, the ADR index, canonical truth, generated status docs, platform manifest, diagrams, dependency graph, ops portal, and changelog portal from the same integrated worktree.

verification.check: Exact-main repository automation and validation bundle
verification.observed: The final exact-main tree passed `scripts/validate_repository_data_models.py --validate`, `scripts/live_apply_receipts.py --validate`, `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards`, `./scripts/validate_repo.sh workstream-surfaces`, `make validate`, `make remote-validate`, `make pre-push-gate`, and `git diff --check` after regenerating `inventory/group_vars/platform.yml` and the updated agent-coordination diagram.

notes: This receipt is the canonical exact-main record for the merged portal bundle that carried ADR 0308, ADR 0310, and ADR 0312 through the same governed production replay.
The production replay refreshed the governed restic config-backup receipt and the host SBOM alongside the portal deployment.
The final repository automation and validation bundle passed from the same `0.177.144 / 0.130.91` tree that is prepared for merge to `main`.

correction_loop.surface: exact-main interactive ops portal live apply
correction_loop.repair_action: When the first combined replay failed copying `scripts/search_fabric/utils.py` because the destination directory was missing under `/opt/ops-portal/service/search_fabric`, added a bounded retry to the shared search-fabric copy task in `ops_portal_runtime` and reran the governed production replay from the same integration worktree.
